title: Planet Labs Revenue Segments and Financial Performance Analysis
text: Planet Labs PBC demonstrates segmented revenue performance across multiple sectors. The company captures daily snapshots of the planet, enabling clients to monitor changes in agriculture, forestry, urban development, energy infrastructure and environmental conditions. Planet develops specialized monitoring services for industries like agriculture, forestry, defense, and disaster response. The company generated record full-year revenue of $308 million in fiscal 2026, representing about 26% year-over-year growth. However, civil government revenue was flat year over year in fiscal 2026, while commercial revenue declined due to the company's focus on large government customers and headwinds in agriculture. Management noted that the company is seeing traction for AI-based solutions in defense and intelligence, with generic AI capabilities potentially helping unlock opportunities in agriculture, insurance, energy, supply chain, and finance.
